title: fix: replace expired README images
author: ElliotEtag
pr_body_excerpt:
- Replaces four expired README image links, including the three visibly broken examples.
- Regenerates all four banners with `nanobanana-2` using the repository’s pixel-art visual style guide.
- Visually reviews every output and regenerates the garden banner to remove pseudo-text.
- Uploads the approved JPEGs to `media.pollinations.ai`; no generated binaries remain in the final repository tree.

Checks:
- All four media URLs return `200 image/jpeg`
- `git diff --check`
- Confirmed the PR’s net file diff changes only `README.md`

Note: `lefthook` is unavailable locally; commits completed successfully.

gist.headline: Fresh art for the front door
gist.blurb: We've spruced up the GitHub README with fresh, cozy pixel art banners generated by nanobanana-2. No more broken image links, just pure aesthetic vibes.
gist.summary: Replaced four expired image links in the repository README with newly generated nanobanana-2 pixel-art banners hosted on media.pollinations.ai.
gist.impact: Visitors to the GitHub repository will now see beautiful, working pixel-art banners instead of broken image placeholders.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee acting as a painter or curator, hanging up fresh new pixel art paintings (banners) on a cozy gallery wall, representing the updated README images. The monitor robot helps hold the frames.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny painter's beret, hanging a fresh new landscape painting on a cozy gallery wall. A chunky robot with a CRT monitor head helps by holding a small picture frame. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley, chunky retro sprites.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny painter's beret, hanging a fresh new landscape painting on a cozy gallery wall. A chunky robot with a CRT monitor head helps by holding a small picture frame. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender gradient background.
